description: Celebrate Pride Month in style with our fashion-focused email template, a vibrant, multicolored marvel that allows you to showcase your latest designs and shop looks. Perfect for designers and fashionistas, this clean, editorial-styled template is ideal for events and seasonal promotions. It's a vibrant nod to the LGBTQ community, radiating the spirit of Pride Month with its bold and brilliant colors. This template is not just about celebration, it's about making a statement - making your brand loud and proud. It's an excellent tool for engaging with your audience, promoting inclusivity, and driving your fashion-forward message home. Whether you're promoting a Pride Month event or launching a new collection, this template will ensure your email marketing stands out in every inbox.
short_description: Showcase your Pride Month fashion designs with our vibrant, multicolored email template. Ideal for designers and events, this clean, editorial-styled template promotes inclusivity and bold expressions of style. Perfect for seasonal promotions and engaging with your audience. Stand out and be loud and proud.

designer.description:
My name is Allison Valenzuela, I'm a Midwest based graphic designer. Born and raised in Davenport, Iowa and currently living in Moline. I graduated from the University of Iowa with a BFA in Graphic Design and a Certificate of Entrepreneurial Management in May 2015.

Taking on a creative challenge, working hard to make ideas a reality and puzzle piecing things together is what I do best. I always sport a positive and can-do attitude. I love doing freelance, so if you've got a project that you'd like to get in touch with me about, send me a message!
